acceptance_targets: [chapter_16_booker_01] PASS if the revised ending anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:343 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:353 contains only one explicit explanatory confirmation of the stoppage before landing on a concrete on-platform beat; FAIL if the passage still repeats the same authority-shift/theme in multiple summary sentences after the decisive hold is already clear.

[chapter_16_craft_01] PASS if, in the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:259 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:277, the reader understands within two sentences of Paloma's entrance that she is carrying original trauma-room evidence with city-backed storage proof, and Teresa/inspector reaction is not interrupted by a long route-reconstruction aside; FAIL if the scene still stops to narrate how Paloma got through the crowd before the reveal lands.

[chapter_16_prose_01] PASS if, across the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:243, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:265, no more than two still use the explicit negative-definition setup before naming the real effect; FAIL if three or more keep the same 'not X, but Y' construction.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised ending anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:343 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:353 contains only one explicit explanatory confirmation of the stoppage before landing on a concrete on-platform beat; FAIL if the passage still repeats the same authority-shift/theme in multiple summary sentences after the decisive hold is already clear.
findings.problem: After the decisive civic lock lands, the chapter re-states the rupture several times in explanatory summary. The inspector's 'city too' turn, Marisol's internal confirmation, the accomplice-cost checklist, and the final thesis sentence all point at the same state change, so the climax loses some of its ferocity by explaining what the scene has already made legible.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress and sharpen the exit around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:343, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:347, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:353. Keep one decisive confirmation that the stoppage will hold, then end on an immediate platform consequence, image, or spoken line instead of another abstract statement of what the system meant or what authority has become.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:259 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:277, the reader understands within two sentences of Paloma's entrance that she is carrying original trauma-room evidence with city-backed storage proof, and Teresa/inspector reaction is not interrupted by a long route-reconstruction aside; FAIL if the scene still stops to narrate how Paloma got through the crowd before the reveal lands.
findings.problem: Paloma's cooler entrance is materially important, but the narration pauses the live crisis to backfill how she stashed it, how she crossed the commuter gate, and why the chain of custody works. In a scene whose power comes from public momentum, that amount of retroactive logistics makes the reveal feel author-managed instead of explosively present.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the reveal at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:259, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:269, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:277 so the beat plays in real time: Paloma arrives, Teresa and the inspectors react, the cooler opens, and the municipal chit/protected contents prove legitimacy. Trim the commuter-gate reconstruction to one short clause or move that explanation elsewhere if it must remain.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:243, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:265, no more than two still use the explicit negative-definition setup before naming the real effect; FAIL if three or more keep the same 'not X, but Y' construction.
findings.problem: A negative-definition sentence shape recurs enough to read as formula: the prose repeatedly tells the reader what a moment is not before stating what it is. Used this often, the correction pattern becomes predictable and slightly self-canceling in a chapter that otherwise wants harder forward drive.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary at least two of the cited beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:101, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:243, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_16.md:265. Lead with the concrete effect, or compress the contrast into a single sentence, rather than opening each beat with an explicit 'it/he was not' correction.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
